summary: End-to-end testing complete for Suhas SK portfolio (backend + frontend). Backend: 7/7 pytest tests pass covering root, projects list, contact POST valid+persistence, contact validation (422), and message sort order. Frontend: all required data-testid elements present (hero, nav, about cards, all 7 project cards, contact form, audio toggle, socials). Contact form validation errors visible for empty submit; valid submit calls POST /api/contact and shows success sonner toast. Audio toggle aria-pressed flips false->true. No JS console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER it is referenced inside send_notification_email (line 184 uses logger before logging.basicConfig at line 249). Not currently exercised because RESEND_API_KEY is empty, but will NameError if Resend send fails. Move logger init to top of file.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider FastAPI lifespan handlers.

Toast text appears duplicated in DOM ('Thanks — your message landed. I'll reply soon.I'll get back to you shortly.') — sonner is rendering title+description concatenated without separator; minor cosmetic.
seed_data_creation: 3 TEST_ prefixed contact messages persisted to MongoDB via backend + UI tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py uses BASE_URL from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (currently https://suhas-labs.preview.emergentagent.com). Note the problem statement referenced a different preview URL but frontend/.env is source of truth. RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty; email_delivered is always false — expected.
